# cloudflare_secrets_store (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) The Account ID to use for the Secrets Store.
- `name` (String) Name of the Secrets Store.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the Secrets Store was created.
- `id` (String) Secrets Store identifier.
- `modified_at` (String) The timestamp when the Secrets Store was last modified.

## Import


~> This resource does not currently support `terraform import`.
